summary: Critical deliverable gaps: workflow references non-existent test file (tests/ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1) and three fixture files (fixtures/*.json) that aren't provided. Workflow installs actionlint but never runs it—task explicitly requires actionlint validation. Missing act-result.txt saving mechanism. PowerShell code itself is well-structured (Set-StrictMode, injectable params, pure logic) but incomplete. Workflow would fail immediately on `Invoke-Pester` step and all fixture-dependent steps. No mechanism to capture/verify act output. Curl-based actionlint install lacks checksum verification.
